title: c/image, c/storage, c/common vendor before Podman 3.3 release
body:
In preparation for Podman v3.3.0, start the vendor dance

c/common - v0.42.0
c/image - v5.15.0
c/storage - v1.33.1

Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

comments.body:
@vrothberg, did I mess up the vendoring, or...?
```
GO111MODULE=on go mod vendor
GO111MODULE=on go mod verify
all modules verified
tree is dirty, please commit all changes and sync the vendor.conf
```

> @vrothberg, did I mess up the vendoring, or...?
> 
> ```
> GO111MODULE=on go mod vendor
> GO111MODULE=on go mod verify
> all modules verified
> tree is dirty, please commit all changes and sync the vendor.conf
> ```

@TomSweeneyRedHat a bit more information is below, in a `git status` format:
```
 M go.sum
```

I can reproduce that locally, I think this needs
```
make vendor
git commit --amend # should update go.sum
```
(A difference between `make vendor` and manual `go mod vendor` is that the former also runs `go mod tidy`, removing unused entries from `go.sum`.)

---

(If there is anything I should be doing for the vendor dance, don’t hesitate to ask — though I can’t promise availability on any specific time today.)
go.sum is still dirty. I opened https://github.com/containers/skopeo/pull/1395 in the interest of time.
